sourcesContent:
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { DEADLINES } from '../data'; const TOP_COLLEGES = [ { name: 'DTU Delhi', branch: 'Computer Science Engineering', match: 82, color: 'badge-success' }, { name: 'NSIT Delhi', branch: 'Information Technology', match: 75, color: 'badge-primary' }, { name: 'IIIT Hyderabad', branch: 'CSE + MS by Research', match: 68, color: 'badge-warn' }, { name: 'VIT Vellore', branch: 'CSE – AI & ML Specialization', match: 88, color: 'badge-success' }, ]; const TOP_CAREERS = [ { icon: '💻', title: 'Software Engineer', salary: '₹8–45 LPA', growth: '↑ 25%' }, { icon: '🧠', title: 'AI/ML Engineer', salary: '₹12–60 LPA', growth: '↑ 38%' }, { icon: '🔒', title: 'Cybersecurity', salary: '₹6–35 LPA', growth: '↑ 32%' }, { icon: '📊', title: 'Data Scientist', salary: '₹10–50 LPA', growth: '↑ 29%' }, ]; export default function Dashboard({ onNavigate }) { const { user } = useAuth(); return (
{/* Header */}

Welcome back, {user?.name?.split(' ')[0]} 👋

Here's your admission journey overview

● Active
{/* Stat Cards */}
{[ { label: 'Admission Chance', value: '78%', sub: '↑ +5% this week', icon: '🎯', color: '#00e5b4', accent: '#00e5b4' }, { label: 'Predicted Rank', value: '#1,240', sub: 'State level estimate', icon: '🏆', color: '#6c63ff', accent: '#6c63ff' }, { label: 'Eligible Colleges', value: '34', sub: 'Based on your profile', icon: '🏛️', color: '#ffb830', accent: '#ffb830' }, { label: 'CGPA Score', value: '8.4', sub: 'Out of 10.0', icon: '📊', color: '#a855f7', accent: '#a855f7' }, ].map((s, i) => (
{s.icon}
{s.label}
{s.value}
{s.sub}
))}
{/* Academic + Colleges Row */}
{/* Academic Snapshot */}
📊 Academic Snapshot
{[ { label: '10th Percentage', value: '92%', pct: 92, color: '#00e5b4' }, { label: '12th Percentage', value: '88%', pct: 88, color: '#6c63ff' }, { label: 'JEE Main Score', value: '145 / 300', pct: 48, color: '#ffb830' }, { label: 'CGPA', value: '8.4 / 10', pct: 84, color: '#a855f7' }, ].map(item => (
{item.label} {item.value}
))}
{/* Top College Matches */}
🎯 Top College Matches
{TOP_COLLEGES.map(c => (
🏛️
{c.name}
{c.branch}
{c.match}%
))}
{/* Career + Deadlines */}
{/* Career Suggestions */}
🚀 AI Career Suggestions
{TOP_CAREERS.map(c => (
onNavigate('career')}>
{c.icon}
{c.title}
{c.salary}
{c.growth} growth/yr
))}
{/* Deadlines */}
📅 Upcoming Deadlines
{DEADLINES.length} due soon
{DEADLINES.map(d => (
{d.icon}
{d.name}
{d.sub}
{d.days} days
))}
); }
